inputs.label: Current Home Value
inputs.businessContext: The current market value of the home.

businessContext_i18n.en: The current market value of the home.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La valeur marchande actuelle du logement.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor de mercado actual de la vivienda.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Capital restant dû sur la ou les hypothèques existantes.
businessContext_i18n.es: Saldo pendiente de la(s) hipoteca(s) existente(s).
businessContext_i18n.ar: الرصيد المستحق على الرهن (الرهون) العقاري الحالي.

inputs.label: Desired Loan Amount
inputs.businessContext: The amount the borrower wants to take out.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount the borrower wants to take out.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Betrag, den der Kreditnehmer aufnehmen möchte.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le montant que l'emprunteur souhaite retirer.
businessContext_i18n.es: La cantidad que el prestatario desea retirar.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المبلغ الذي يرغب المقترض في سحبه.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual nominal interest rate for the home equity loan.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual nominal interest rate for the home equity loan.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ev kredisi için yıllık nominal faiz oranı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux d'intérêt nominal annuel pour le prêt sur valeur domiciliaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de interés nominal anual del préstamo sobre el valor líquido de la vivienda.
businessContext_i18n.ar: معدل الفائدة الاسمي السنوي لقرض ملكية المنزل.

inputs.label: Max Loan-to-Value Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowable combined loan-to-value ratio (CLTV) as a percentage.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum allowable combined loan-to-value ratio (CLTV) as a percentage. CLTV = (remaining mortgage + new loan) / home value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İzin verilen maksimum birleşik kredi-değer oranı (CLTV) yüzdesi. CLTV = (kalan ipotek + yeni kredi) / ev değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximal zulässiges kombiniertes Beleihungsverhältnis (CLTV) in Prozent. CLTV = (bestehende Hypothek + neues Darlehen) / Immobilienwert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ratio prêt-valeur combiné maximal autorisé (CLTV) en pourcentage. CLTV = (hypothèque restante + nouveau prêt) / valeur du logement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Relación máxima combinada préstamo-valor (CLTV) permitida como porcentaje. CLTV = (hipoteca restante + nuevo préstamo) / valor de la vivienda.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الحد الأقصى المسموح به لنسبة القرض المجمع إلى القيمة (CLTV) كنسبة مئوية. CLTV = (الرهن العقاري المتبقي + القرض الجديد) / قيمة المنزل.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Desired loan amount must be positive.
Max LTV must be between 0 and 100.
Remaining mortgage must be less than home value.
